title: Customer Interview Notes
summary: Early users prefer tools that run on their own machine when testing with notes, drafts, or customer documents.
risks: users may still expect sync later

title: Prototype Usage Log Summary
summary: Users completed local import and summarization more often than team-sharing setup. Most drop-offs happened when configuration required accounts or remote services.

title: Founder Strategy Note
summary: The initial product should prove quality and repeat use before introducing mobile, team, or marketplace complexity.
risks: slower collaboration features may reduce team adoption
